name: get_nearest_site
short_description: Get a site of a particular site type nearest a site
full_help:
get_nearest_site

Description: 
Get a site of a particular site type nearest a site

Syntax: 
get_nearest_site  [-site <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<site_types>]

Returns: 
site object

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-site]         Site from which to search
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<site_types>]  Target site types

Categories: 
Device

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
